title: Peremption
doc_html:
§912.6.  Peremption

Any action to enforce any warranty provided in this Part shall be subject to a peremptive period of thirty days after the expiration of the appropriate time period provided in R.S. 51:912.4.

Acts 2012, No. 112, §1.
